title: Add oscore_ctx_persist_ssn() call after OSCORE option build in oscore_protect_request
description: After line ~1520 where *oscore_opt_len is set, add ret = oscore_ctx_persist_ssn(ctx); if (ret == OSCORE_ERR_NVM_FAILED) goto nvm_failed; else ret = OSCORE_OK; Ensure this happens only on full success path. Reference bead project-LICHEN-ow3c.1.3.4.2 and oscore.c:1515-1523.
